summary: Initial ElevenLabs audio scaffold only; no FPS audio workflow exists.
observations: No future FPS audio manifest, generation script, or mix policy exists yet.
decisions: Do not expose ElevenLabs API keys in browser code.
Generate server-side or build-time and cache audio as assets.
Record prompt and settings metadata for generated audio.
risks: Runtime secret usage would leak API keys in the web build.
Untracked generated audio cannot be reproduced or credited.
